programme.title: Forbidden Science - Clone Fantasy
programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat El Dorado Takes on Cortez Bank: Part Two
programme.desc: Fishing out west has been fantastic this year, but eventually, the fish move or disappear due to currents, weather, or heavy traffic. However, there are always some offshore banks that have resident fish on or around them year-round, and one of those spots is called the Cortez Bank. You can always guarantee one thing: if you make it 110 miles, you'll catch some big Rockfish. Additionally, if Mother Nature and currents work out in your favor, there can be some incredible Yellowtail fishing on the bank. Today, we're rallying up for our "Stoked On Fishing" day and a half charter on board the one and only El Dorado, a top vessel in the Long Beach sport fishing scene. With anticipation running high, we can't wait to cast our lines and see what kind of adventures await us on the open waters.

Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: Locked On College Football
programme.desc: Locked On College Football Podcast is your essential daily podcast for staying ahead in the world of college football. Hosted by the insightful D1 college play-by-play announcer Spencer McLaughlin, the Locked On College Football Podcast brings you the latest news, analysis, and insider information that every college football fan craves. From in-depth coverage of realignment and the transfer portal to QB battles and beyond, Spencer keeps you updated on the biggest college football stories from every corner of the country.

programme.title: Locked On SEC
programme.desc: Chris Gordy hosts Locked On SEC, a daily podcast dedicated to bringing SEC fans the most up-to-date info when it comes to Southeastern Conference sports. The Locked On SEC podcast brings you interviews, analysis and match-up breakdowns heading into every week of games. If you're a fan of any school in the conference, it's a show that you do not want to miss. It's the Locked on SEC Podcast, part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.desc:

Hear from some of the conference's biggest experts and insiders that know your school inside and out.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: Spook Town (1944)
programme.desc: A government agent travels to a remote town rumored to be haunted, where a series of mysterious events are being used to frighten residents away from valuable land. As he investigates, he uncovers a scheme by outlaws exploiting superstition to carry out their plans, and works to expose the truth and restore order.

programme.title: Son of the Renegade, 1942
programme.desc: The son of a notorious outlaw grows up unaware of his father’s criminal past. As he comes of age, he is drawn into a conflict between lawmen and outlaws, forcing him to confront the truth about his heritage. Struggling between loyalty and justice, he must decide whether to follow in his father’s footsteps or forge his own path on the side of the law.

programme.title: Saddle Mountain Roundup (1941)
programme.desc: A determined rancher and his allies stand up against a group of outlaws attempting to seize control of valuable land near Saddle Mountain. As tensions rise, courage and quick thinking are put to the test in a battle to protect rightful ownership and restore peace to the range

programme.title: Red River Valley (1936)
programme.desc: Gene Autry helps a young woman defend her ranch from a group of outlaws attempting to seize control of the land, uncovering a plot of deception and greed while working to bring the criminals to justice

programme.title: Sergeant Preston of the Yukon — S2:E19: Blind Justice (1956)
programme.desc: Sergeant Preston investigates a case involving a man accused of a crime he may not have committed. As he searches for the truth in the harsh Yukon territory, Preston uncovers evidence that challenges the initial judgment, determined to ensure that justice is served fairly

programme.title: This Man Can't Die
programme.desc: Bounty hunter Martin Benson seeks the leader of a vicious outlaw smuggler gang who killed his parents and raped his sister, while his other siblings hide a wounded gang member in hopes of more info and try to help.

programme.title: Billy The Kid Returns
programme.desc: Rogers plays a lookalike to the dead Billy The Kid and restores the tranquility of Lincoln County after subduing the criminal element.

programme.title: Minnesota Clay 1964
programme.desc: In Minnesota Clay, Cameron Mitchell stars as a gunfighter with fading eyesight, fighting to clear his name before blindness claims him. Wrongly imprisoned and hunted by both lawmen and outlaws, Clay must rely on skill, cunning, and sheer will to survive. With tense showdowns, stark desert landscapes, and the grit of early Spaghetti Western style, this is the tale of a man racing against time—and his own failing vision—for justice.

programme.title: The Gabby Hayes Show - Plumber
programme.desc: Dramatizing the lives of historical figures, such as the naval commander, the lawman and professional gambler, and the outlaw Belle, tall tales and Western scenes

programme.title: The Fighting Renegade
programme.desc: A government agent falsely accused of murdering a professor takes the identity of "The Puma", a Mexican vigilante leader, to hide his real identity and find the actual killers.
